description: Pre-registered, blinded, multi-strength causal dose-response on unseen architectures across text + vision. Frozen alpha prediction before training.
note_on_alpha: alpha* fixed from LOAO-12 per-dataset intercept fit. NO refit allowed during this experiment.
note_unseen: All 6 architectures are outside the 12-arch LOAO training set (Pythia/GPT-Neo/Qwen/OLMo/TinyLlama/Mistral/Falcon-H1/RWKV).
method_rationale: Training-based triplet loss (5 seeds, lambda=0.10, L2-norm) causes kappa_nearest COLLAPSE (q: 0.71->0.22) because random triplets target average inter-class distance, not kappa_nearest. Frozen do-surgery directly manipulates kappa_nearest without training confounds. This is the correct causal method.
surgery_meaning: Scale factor applied to nearest-class centroid distance: negative=push closer (decrease kappa), positive=push apart (increase kappa). 0=no surgery.

prediction_formula.step1: For each (arch, surgery_scale s): apply frozen do-surgery to shift nearest centroid, measure delta_kappa_nearest
prediction_formula.step4: Measure actual q_obs via 1-NN on surgery-modified embeddings
prediction_formula.note: No training involved — surgery is applied post-hoc to frozen embeddings

pass_criteria.directional: At least 5/6 architectures: mean_delta_q(lambda<0) < 0 AND mean_delta_q(lambda>0) > 0
pass_criteria.quantitative_r: Pooled Pearson r(delta_q_pred, delta_q_obs) >= 0.90 across all nonzero doses and 6 architectures
pass_criteria.blinding: Predictions file SHA-256 hash matches pre-registered design_hash before unblinding

fail_definition: ANY pass criterion not met = FAIL (no partial credit)

score_impact.if_pass: 5.0-6.0/10 (Nobel) - meaningful causal boost with quantitative cross-modal evidence
score_impact.if_fail: Still publishable as honest negative result; informs theory gaps

prior_causal_results_summary.orthogonal_factorial_nlp: Arm A r=0.899, Arm C r=0.000 PASS
prior_causal_results_summary.cifar_triplet_arm_warning: Prior training-based triplet on CIFAR-100 showed kappa collapse (gradient conflict). Use L2-norm + small lambda to mitigate.

critical_warning: DO NOT use training-based triplet. CONFIRMED FAILURE: L2-norm + lambda=0.10 training collapses kappa_nearest from 0.45 to 0.04-0.09, q from 0.71 to 0.22 (5 seeds). Use frozen surgery only.

estimated_runtime_frozen.total: 6 archs x 7 scales x 3 seeds x 5 min = ~10 GPU-hours
estimated_runtime_frozen.wall_clock: ~0.5 days on RTX 5090 (100x faster than training-based)
